description: CompositionDark blue denim jeggings made of 73% cotton, 24% polyester and 3% spandex, with a partly faded touch, waist elasticated at the back and two back pockets with embroideryFittingRegularWash care Machine or hand wash separately Use mild detergent only Do not bleach or wring Dry in shade Medium iron With the look of jeans and style of leggings, these jeggings from jealous 21 are a great addition to any woman's wardrobe. The elasticated waist fits snugly, while you can team this with a stylish top and comfortable footwear from the wide range at myntra for that casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers of length 39"Height: 5'8”; Waist: 26”; Hips: 36”
